summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Kshitij Dinni's cinematic 3D portfolio website. All core features are working perfectly including loading screen, navigation, GitHub API integration, contact form, and canvas particle effects.
passed_tests: Loading screen with progress bar and 'ENTER EXPERIENCE' button
Navigation between all zones (PROJECTS, SKILLS, ABOUT, CONTACT)
Hero zone displays 'KSHITIJ DINNI' name and all social links (GitHub, LinkedIn, Email, Phone)
Projects zone fetches and displays 9 GitHub repositories from /api/github/repos
Skills zone shows 16 skill orbs with category filters (ALL, FRONTEND, BACKEND, DEVOPS)
About zone displays profile info and 3 experience timeline items
Contact form successfully submits to /api/contact endpoint with success feedback
Section indicator dots (5 dots) work for navigation between zones
Canvas particle background renders with floating shapes and grid effects
All backend API endpoints (6/6) working correctly
Form validation and error handling working properly
Responsive design and hover effects functioning
No JavaScript errors or console warnings detected
